<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Working directory clean, proceed with Task #3">
Working directory is clean now — only your Task #3 files remain:
- src/routes/todos.rs (modified)

- tests/api/todos.rs (modified)

The register.html, register.rs, and main.css changes have been reverted. You're clear to proceed. Remember to commit and push at every green step.
</teammate-message>
